3. Production

Back to PLOT BOT
1. Hardware design
2. Software design
4. BOM and files

Goals

  1. Fab-able
    • CNC milling double-sided PCB
    • 3D printable frame wheels

Electronics production

The custom PCB was fabricated using a CNC milling machine at FabLab Kannai. Since the board is double-sided, a flipping process was required while aligning the top and bottom layers. That was achieved using “Gerber2Png” developed by FabLab Kerala.

Detailed process: Fab Academy documentation
Ref: Gerber2Png / Documentation

PCB milling

Alignment cut

Bottom side

Soldered

Board test

Machine building

Frame

Mecanum wheel

TPU printing for the rollers

TINMORRY TPU: Shore hardness: 95A

Ref.

  • Bambu Lab Wiki - TPU printing
  • TINMORRY filament profile for Bambu
